problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
